# services.molly-brown

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.molly-brown`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.molly-brown.certPath` | `absolute path` | Path to TLS certificate. An ACME certificate and key may be shared with an HTTP server, but only if molly-brown has permissions allowing it to read such keys. As an example: `systemd.services.molly-brown.serviceConfig.SupplementaryGroups =   [ config.security.acme.certs."example.com".group ];` |
| `services.molly-brown.docBase` | `absolute path` | Base directory for Gemini content. |
| `services.molly-brown.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Molly-Brown Gemini server. |
| `services.molly-brown.hostName` | `string` | The hostname to respond to requests for. Requests for URLs with other hosts will result in a status 53 (PROXY REQUEST REFUSED) response. |
| `services.molly-brown.keyPath` | `absolute path` | Path to TLS key. See {option}`CertPath`. |
| `services.molly-brown.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port for molly-brown to bind to. |
| `services.molly-brown.settings` | `TOML value` | molly-brown configuration. Refer to <https://tildegit.org/solderpunk/molly-brown/src/branch/master/example.conf> for details on supported values. |
